summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations, merges, or fix PRs are allowed by this job. Non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/backlog handling; security-sensitive PRs are quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.

actions.reason: Focused non-security bug-fix PR with unresolved proof gate; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Useful candidate for the Dream Diary timeout issue, but it needs maintainer/product review and cannot be merged or repaired in this job.
Small docs PR tied to an open docs issue; keep for maintainer follow-up rather than close.
Substantive contributor PR tied to an open performance issue; broad scope and review blockers prevent merge/close planning.
Touches workspace boundary/trust behavior; route only this PR to central OpenClaw security handling.
Related Telegram reliability PR with maintainer-review blockers; not safe to close or merge in this inventory shard.
Provider/media transport boundary concerns make this security-sensitive for central handling.
Active contributor PR with focused code and unresolved proof/check failures; keep for follow-up rather than close.
Provider header/auth behavior is security-boundary-adjacent; route this PR to central security handling.
